Trusted Products
About Us

Passion Meets
Precision

At Danilo's Detailing, we take pride in delivering high end, bespoke detailing for all types of vehicles. Every car we work on is treated with genuine care and attention to detail, with a strong focus on getting the best possible result both interior and exterior.

Whether you're after a full vehicle transformation, a multi stage paint refinement, or one of our premium ceramic or graphene coatings, our goal is to deliver outstanding results with lasting protection and clarity.

99+
Happy Clients
5★
Google Rating
3+
Years Experience
What We Offer

Our Services

Detailing
Mini Detail
1.5 - 2.5 hours
Interior
  • Complete Interior Vacuumed
  • Interior Wiped Down
  • All Door & Boot Jams Wiped
  • All Windows Cleaned
  • Air Refreshener Applied
Exterior
  • Wheels & Tyres Decontaminated
  • Pre Soak
  • Full Exterior Foam Wash
  • Microfibre Towel Dried
  • Long Life Tyre Dressing Applied
Book Now
Premium Detail
2.5 - 4 hours
Interior
  • Complete Interior Vacuumed
  • Full Interior Scrubbed Down and Wiped
  • All Door & Boot Jams Wiped
  • Windows Cleaned
  • Air Refreshener Applied
Exterior
  • Wheels, Tyres, Barrels & Arches Decontaminated
  • Full Exterior Foam Wash
  • Badges & Crevices Brushed
  • Iron Fallout Removal
  • Microfibre Towel Dried
  • Ceramic Sealant Applied
  • Long Life Tyre Dressing Applied
Book Now
Paint Correction
Stage 1 Correction
  • Complete Premium Detail
  • Full Iron Decontamination
  • Clay Bar Treatment
  • Light Swirl Removal (60-70%)
  • Enhances Gloss & Clarity
  • Thorough Paint Preparation Wipedown
  • Hybrid Ceramic Sealant (SiO2)
Book Now
Stage 2 Correction
  • Everything in Stage 1
  • Further Removal of Deeper Surface Scratches (80-95%)
  • Hybrid Ceramic Sealant (SiO2)
Book Now
Ceramic & Graphene Coating
Select New Car Coating
  • Complete Premium Detail
  • Full Iron Decontamination
  • Clay Bar Treatment
  • 5 Year Prizm Ceramic Coating on all Paint, Plastics, Headlights & Taillights
  • Extreme Hydrophobic Protection & Ease of Maintenance
Book Now

  • Full Iron Decontamination
  • Clay Bar Treatment
  • Single or Dual Stage Correction
  • Swirls & Scratches Reduced (60-95%)
  • Thorough Panel Wipe
  • 5 Year Prizm Ceramic Coating on all Paint, Plastics, Headlights & Taillights
  • Extreme Hydrophobic Protection & Ease of Maintenance
  • High Gloss & Clarity

What Our Customers Say

★★★★★

Flawlessly detailed my car, in a time period where I witnessed with my own two eyes how hard he was working, and I could not recommend it enough to any new customers.

Rocco Chiandotto
View on Google Maps ↗
★★★★★

Danilo detailed mine and my sisters cars yesterday. They look amazing. He does a spectacular job on both the interior & exterior. Great attention to detail. Highly recommend!

Narelle Hammond
View on Google Maps ↗
★★★★★

Danilo is a very meticulous worker and makes sure that every part of the car is taken care of. My car and the rest of the fleet I had washed came out looking like brand new cars. Very Happy with the services provided and couldn't recommend Danilo higher.

Samuel Hammond
View on Google Maps ↗
★★★★★

Great detailer great guy get your car detailed by Danilo if you want your car looking brand new.

Sebastian Natoli
